description:
Configure the 'Possible Ransomware Attack' alert profile in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus to detect rapid file modifications. The profile must have a threshold of 50 events within 1 minute and email notifications enabled for soc-alerts@acmefinancial.com with the subject 'CRITICAL: Ransomware Activity Detected'. Save the configuration and export a screenshot of the configuration page to C:\workspace\ransomware_config_evidence.png.

Login credentials:
- Username: admin
- Password: Admin@2024 (or current admin password)
